case_title: ZACH KIMSEY VS. JORDY MONT-REYNAUD et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,550.00 FILED BY KIMSEY, ZACH AS TO DEFENDANT MONT-REYNAUD, JORDY DOJO LABS INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT.
